cont_1a_trd_i: *1. a) Checking the Emergency Stop Button. (Functional & Working).
cont_1b_trd_i: *1. b) Up/Down Safety Cover must be Functional & Working. (No Damage/Crack, Not Blurred
cont_1c_trd_i: *1. c). Slide Cutter Plate. (In Good Condition)
cont_1d_trd_i: *1. d). Guide Plate.[Available, In Good Condition, No Damage]
cont_1e_trd_i: *1. e). Industrial Cutter.[Available, In Good Condition, No Damage]
cont_1f_trd_i: *1. f). String Cutter.[Available, In Good Condition, No Damage]
cont_4a_trd_i: *4. a. NG Judgment at F Side “Mis-Stripping”.
cont_4b_trd_i: *4. b. NG Judgment at R Side “Mis-Stripping”.
cont_5a_trd_i: *5. a. NG Judgment at F Side “Seal Mis-Insertion”.
cont_5b_trd_i: *5. b. NG Judgment at R Side “Seal Mis-Insertion”.
cont_6a_trd_i: 6. a. NG Judgment at “Mis-Crimping” for F Side.
cont_6b_trd_i: 6. b. NG Judgment at “Mis-Crimping” for R Side.
cont_7a_trd_i: 7. a. Check the Strip Trash, the Carrier Trash, the Wire Core Trash in the Machine.
cont_7b_trd_i: 7. b. Check the dispersion of the Tools and Tools are putted on Proper position.
cont_7c_trd_i: 7. c. Check whether there is not an unnecessary Electric Wire around the Machine.
cont_7d_trd_i: 7. d. Check whether an Applicator is returned to Proper position.
cont_7d_trd_i2: 7. d. Check whether an Applicator is returned to Proper position.
cont_7e_trd_i: 7. e. Clean the Terminal Line-Up Mat & Vinyl Sheet Cover and Check whether there is Damage.
cont_8a_trd_i: 8. a. Oiler must be Available in R & F Side.
cont_8a_trd_i2: 8. a. Oiler must be Available in R & F Side.
cont_8b_trd_i: 8. b. Oiler Felt is Not Missing/Damage,
cont_8b_trd_i2: 8. b. Oiler Felt is Not Missing/Damage,
cont_8c_trd_i: 8. c. Oiler Magnet is Not Misssing/Damage.
cont_8c_trd_i2: 8. c. Oiler Magnet is Not Misssing/Damage.
cont_8d_trd_i: 8. d. Oiler is Aligned to Insulation Barrel.
cont_8d_trd_i2: 8. d. Oiler is Aligned to Insulation Barrel.
cont_8e_trd_i: 8. e. Oiler has Oil, Good in Condition/Appearance).
cont_8e_trd_i2: 8. e. Oiler has Oil, Good in Condition/Appearance).
cont_9a_trd_i: 9. Must be Present and in Good Condition. No Breakage and Loose Bolt.
cont_10a_trd_i: 10. No Lacking / Missing of Parts. Smooth Rotation of Coiling.
cont_11a_trd_i: 11. Must be Aligned with Seal Holder.
cont_11a_trd_i2: 11. Must be Aligned with Seal Holder.
cont_12a_trd_i: *12. Must be Both Front & Rear Sensor LED Light Blinking.
cont_12a_trd_i2: *12. Must be Both Front & Rear Sensor LED Light Blinking.
cont_13a_trd_i: 13. a. No Abrasions, No Chips or Crack.
cont_14a_trd_i: 14. a.No Holes, No Cracks or Damage on Feed Belt.
cont_15a_trd_i: 15. a. No Damage on the Roller.
cont_16a_trd_i: 16. a. Feeder Bowl: (In Good Condition). (No Foreign Materials, No Dust, No Damage).
cont_16c_trd_i: 16. c. Hose Fittings & Connections: (No Bend or Damage Hose and Fittings).
cont_16d1_trd_i: 16. d. Seal Cassette Unit. (Aligned to Seal Holder).
cont_16d2_trd_i: 16. d. Seal Escape Unit. (Must have Safety Cover).
cont_16g_trd_i: 16. g. Gomusen Oil Remover Components:(Check All Parts Condition)
cont_17a_trd_i: 17. a. Wire Supply: Wire Sensors / Wire Tangle Sensors Condition: (No Damage, Not Loose and Properly Fixed in Position).
cont_17b_trd_i: 17. b. Wire Supply: Wire Spring Condition. (Present / Not Bend.)
cont_17c_trd_i: 17. c. Wire Supply: Bolt Tightening & Hoop Guide Condition. (Must be Tight.)
cont_17d_trd_i: 17. d. Wire Supply: Basket Guide Condition. (No Damage or Loose Attachment.)
cont_17e_trd_i: 17. e. Wire Supply: Vinyl Plastic Cover's Condition. (No Damage.)
cont_17f_trd_i: 17. f. Wire Supply: Wire Guide Condition. (No Damage.)
cont_17g_trd_i: 17. g. Wire Run Out Sensor: (Must be Functioning).
cont_20b_trd_i: 20. Check the Condition of the Electric Wire Passage Lines. (Eyelet). (No Abrasion, Damage, Scratch & Missing).
cont_21_trd_i: 21. Check on Work Screen, "Operator Level = (0), Must be LOG IN".
cont_30_trd_i: 30. Check the Barcode Label vs. Actual, No Faded Barcode Label. [Applicator]
